## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Release / packaging

## Checklist

- [ ] I tested the addon in-game or reviewed the affected Lua code carefully.
- [ ] I did not add old database usage such as `MoldDetectorDB` or `LihvoDruidaDB`.
- [ ] `GroupGuardLFGDB` remains the only SavedVariables database.
- [ ] No nationality, ethnicity, origin, religion, or personal-trait targeting was added.
- [ ] LFG behavior and party/raid removal remain separate.
- [ ] Premade Groups Filter compatibility uses safe hooks only.
